Gameplay Basics

Explore
Fly freely across the world and marvel at its beauty. Health gradually regenerates while in Explorer mode.
Defend
Defend countries under attack from enemy dragons. Reach the country before time expires, or it will be captured.
Face-off
Race a friend in real time. Each of you picks 5 countries for the other to find — whoever finds all 5 fastest (or finds the most before the 2-minute clock runs out) wins.

Settings

Keyboard Controls
GToggle Explore / Defend mode
FToggle Face-off mode
WIncrease Altitude
SDecrease Altitude
Up ArrowThrust
Down ArrowSlow down
Right ArrowFly Right
Left ArrowFly Left
SpaceBreathe Fire
TSwitch Camera (Top-down / Cinematic / Action)
Graphics (Video and Audio)
LToggle Dragon Shadows (On / Off)
PToggle Country Borders (On / Off)
KToggle Weather Effects — Rain / Snow / Lightning (On / Off)
MToggle Music (On / Off)
NToggle Sound Effects (On / Off)
Mouse Controls
Mouse DragMove Camera (Top-down / Cinematic modes only)
Mouse WheelZoom In / Out
Left ClickBreathe Fire (Action mode only)
